coordination_skills: assign scout, escort, and rear-guard roles
body-block enemies without trapping the escorted unit
time objective movement with lane control
metadata.tier_test_focus: Minimal single-agent probe for recognizing the escort/protection signal without extra branches.

entry_probe.name: Entry Probe
entry_probe.description: A compact start area that exposes the first escort/protection choice immediately.

axis_cell.name: Axis Cell
axis_cell.description: Small objective cell focused on escort/protection without extra branches.

scripts.lite_design_note: A four-room rescue with one captive marker, one lock/trap, and a sentinel guarding the return route.

achievements.title: Pico Axis Probe
achievements.description: Make progress in the pico Iron Captive variant while preserving the escort/protection signal.
